t_ch: 委托人是一位孩童，虔诚的信徒潘，内容是——「妈妈的灵魂在哪」。
t_en: The request comes from a child — a devout follower named Pam — and it reads: "Where is my mother's soul?"

t_ch: 能找到吗？
t_en: Can we ever find a soul?

t_ch: …就位吧，辅祭。
t_en: ...Take your position, acolyte.

t_ch: 伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，万千道路的化身啊！我们请求您的指引！
t_en: Great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}, embodiment of countless ways! We seek your guidance!

t_ch: 迷津隆隆作响……
t_en: The Maze groans deeply...

t_ch: 交给你了，辅祭。
t_en: I'll leave it to you, acolyte.

t_ch: 不出所料，冥界…塞纳托斯的领域。再合理不过的解答。
t_en: As expected... The nether realm — Thanatos' domain. A perfectly reasonable answer.

t_ch: 就这么交付吗？
t_en: Should we just tell the child this?

t_ch: 总觉得还不够。
t_en: It doesn't feel enough.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「冥界究竟在何处？」
t_en: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where exactly is the nether realm"?

t_ch: 迷津隆隆作响……
t_en: The Maze groans deeply...

t_ch: 原谅我的自作主张，辅祭。但我…也希望能得到答案。交给你了。
t_en: Forgive my presumption, acolyte. But I... I also wish to know. Your turn.

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Let's do it.

t_ch: 预示出现了变化，但这究竟……？
t_en: The omen has changed, but what does it mean...?

t_ch: 某种哲学理论？
t_en: A philosophical theory?

t_ch: 和神话传说有关？
t_en: Mythological connections?

t_ch: 我想，我们还需要一次推演，这会是最后一次了。
t_en: I think we need one final extrapolation. This will be the last attempt.

t_ch: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——「您的虔诚信徒潘，她母亲所在的冥界究竟在何处？」
t_en: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us — "Where exactly is the nether realm where Pam's mother resides"?

t_ch: 迷津隆隆作响……
t_en: The Maze groans deeply...

t_ch: 去吧，辅祭，为委托画上结束符。
t_en: Go, acolyte, and bring closure to this request.

t_ch: 准备好看到答案了吗？
t_en: Are you ready to see the answer?

t_ch: …对同一个问题的推演，三次便是极限，无论如何，我们已经尽力了。
t_en: Three attempts are the limit for a single question. No matter what, we've done our best.

t_ch: 辅祭…能麻烦你把这石板交给那孩子吗？我在这等你。
t_en: Acolyte... Could you deliver this slate to the child? I'll wait here for you.

t_ch: 我去去就回。
t_en: I'll be on my way then.

t_ch: 愿门径…指引我们的方向。
t_en: Oh, may the Passage guide us.

t_ch: 辅祭，石板托付于你了，去交给那个孩子吧。愿门径…指引我们的方向。
t_en: Acolyte, please deliver the slate to that child. May the Passage guide us.

t_ch: {F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你是谁？
t_en: Who are you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

t_ch: 我来交付雅努斯的神谕。
t_en: I've come to deliver Janus's prophecy.

t_ch: …布？心？我知道了！是上衣口袋里面，妈妈给我做的护身符！妈妈的灵魂就在里面吗？
t_en: A cloth? A heart? I understand now! It's the amulet in my jacket pocket — the one Mom made for me! Is my mom's soul inside?

t_ch: 孩子拿出布袋，用力撕扯起来。很快你们发现，绸布的内壁上写着些文字。
t_en: The child pulls out the pouch and begins to tear it apart. Before long, you both notice writing on the inner silk lining.

t_ch: 「亲爱的潘：无论我们相距多远，妈妈都会永远陪在你的身边。」
t_en: "Dear Pam: No matter how far apart we are, Mom will always be with you."

t_ch: 呜，呜…嘶…呜呜……
t_en: Waaa, waaa... *sobs* Waaaaaa...

t_ch: 谢谢你，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！我回家去了，我要把护身符缝好！妈妈教过我了！下次见吧！
t_en: Thank you, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! I'm going home to sew this amulet back together! Mom taught me how! See you next time!

t_ch: 你回来了…结果如何？
t_en: You're back... How did it go?

t_ch: 你将刚刚发生的事告诉了祭司……
t_en: You recount the events to the priest...

t_ch: 是吗…呵……
t_en: Is that so... Well...

t_ch: 辅祭，虽说我先前推荐你来圣殿就职，实际上，这并不是份好差事。祭司的生活枯燥乏味，还常要与愚昧贪腐之人同流合污，我实在不愿在此久留……
t_en: Acolyte, though I've previously recommended you for a position in the temple, truthfully, it's not a great career. A priest's life is dull and monotonous, often involving dealing with ignorance and corruption. I've no desire to linger here longer than necessary.

t_ch: 但…接触人们的信仰时，总会有那么几件事，能让我暂时忘掉那些烦闷，全身心投入到职务中去，这些委托便是如此。
t_en: But... when interacting with people's faith, there are always a few moments that make me forget those frustrations and immerse myself in my duties. These requests were such moments.

t_ch: 辛苦了，辅祭。如此一来，积压的委托就全数完成了，去命运泰坦前称颂自己的美德吧，这是你应得的。
t_en: Great work, acolyte. Now that all the backlog has been completed, go to the Fate Titans and extol your virtues — you've earned it.

t_ch: 另外，还有些许旧卷遗存，多是无主无名的条目，没有报酬，难度极高。若能将它们解决，也称得上是祭司的荣光…感兴趣的话就来找我吧。
t_en: Additionally, there are a few old scrolls left, mostly unidentified and masterless entries, offering no rewards and posing significant difficulty. Resolving them would truly be a priest's glory. If you're interested, come find me.

t_ch: …愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
t_en: ...May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.

t_ch: 迷津已经展露。去溯寻吧，辅祭，我会记录下推演的结果。
t_en: The Maze has been revealed. Go trace it, acolyte. I'll record the results of the divination.

t_ch: 瞧瞧谁来了？你的气色不错，辅祭，来找我是有什么事吗？
t_en: Well, look who's here! You look great, acolyte. What brings you to me today?

t_ch: 我要挑战高难度的旧卷！
t_en: I want to tackle the challenging old scrolls!

t_ch: 我就猜你会感兴趣。选一卷吧。
t_en: I knew you'd be interested. Choose one.

t_ch: 金卷。
t_en: The Golden Scroll.

t_ch: 金卷的问题是——「丢失的一千万利衡币在何处」，让我布置一下……
t_en: Its question is — "Where is my lost ten million Balance Coins?" Let me set the ceremony up...

t_ch: 银卷。
t_en: The Silver Scroll.

t_ch: 银卷的问题是——「一切事物的答案在何处」，让我布置一下……
t_en: Its question is — "Where is the answer to everything?" Let me set the ceremony up...

t_ch: 白卷。
t_en: The White Scroll.

t_ch: 白卷的问题是——「我想找的东西在何处」，让我布置一下……
t_en: Its question is — "Where is the thing I'm looking for?" Let me set the ceremony up...

t_ch: 迷津隆隆作响……
t_en: The Maze groans deeply...

t_ch: 迷津已经展露。去吧，辅祭。
t_en: The Maze has been revealed. Go ahead, acolyte.

t_ch: 我来找你聊聊天。
t_en: I'm here for a little chat.

t_ch: 当然可以，我面前站着一位见多识广的辅祭，想必聊多久都不会无聊。
t_en: Of course! It is fascinating talking to a well-traveled individual such as yourself, no matter how long we chat.

t_ch: 关于雅努斯迷津…
t_en: About Janus' Maze...

t_ch: 能够溯寻一切事物的卜筮器具，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的伟大权能…类似的称号还有很多，就不一一列举了，这是「迷津」在世人眼中的形象。
t_en: The divination tool capable of extrapolating all things, the great power of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... it has many such titles, so I won't list them all. This is how the world sees the "Maze."

t_ch: 而作为祭司，我们的了解会比民众更深入，比如，「迷津」的形制模拟了雅努斯于门径中穿行的行为，它的历史甚至要比这命运三相殿本身还要久远，等等。
t_en: As priests, however, we understand it on a deeper level. For instance, the Maze's structure simulates Janus traversing the Passage, and its history predates even the Temple of the Three Fates.

t_ch: 若是你对卜筮的历程感兴趣，不如浏览一下这里的书架，能找到过去迷津溯寻的记录册——虽然多半都是重复且无意义的委托。
t_en: If you're interested in the history of divination, feel free to browse the bookshelves here. You'll find records of past Maze extrapolations — though most are repetitive and trivial requests.

t_ch: 你在卜筮时具体做什么？
t_en: What exactly do you do during divination?

t_ch: 我是「执笔人」。每次推演后，你所见到的石板，都是石笔自行移动勾勒而出的，而此期间需要由执笔人来握持。
t_en: I'm the "scribe." Each time an extrapolation concludes, the slate you see is etched by the self-moving stone stylus, but someone must hold it throughout the process.

t_ch: 这份工作至关重要，推演时，执笔者必须维持全神贯注的状态，否则不但会影响溯寻的结果，还可能令仪式本身变得意外频频。
t_en: This task is crucial. During extrapolation, the scribe must maintain unwavering focus. Otherwise, not only will the results be affected, but the ceremony itself might become fraught with unexpected issues.

t_ch: 如果你对这一职务感兴趣，建议搬来殿内居住，我会手把手教你。不出六十个光历年，我想便能入门了。
t_en: If you're interested in this role, I suggest moving into the temple. I'll teach you myself, and within sixty Light Calendar years, you'll be well on your way to mastering it.

t_ch: 我也想向迷津提问。
t_en: I'd like to ask the Maze a question myself.

t_ch: 哦？辅祭也有欲寻之物？当然可以。你知道的，提出委托本应经过层层审批——
t_en: Oh? Does the acolyte also have something to seek? Of course, you know that submitting a request usually requires several approvals —

t_ch: 但无需担心，这些琐碎步骤就全都简省吧，以辅祭的贡献，我倒要看看谁有意见。所以，你想问些什么？
t_en: But no need to worry. We'll skip those tedious steps. With your contributions, I'd like to see who'd dare object. So, what would you like to ask?

t_ch: …我的故乡在哪？
t_en: ...Where is my homeland?

t_ch: …我的未来在哪？
t_en: ...Where is my future?

t_ch: …我是谁？
t_en: ...Who am I?

t_ch: 让我们来看看。{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——
t_en: Let's see. O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —

t_ch: 迷津隆隆作响，但……
t_en: The Maze groans deeply, but...

t_ch: 这…{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}并未给出推演的流程？数百个光历年来可从未发生过啊！
t_en: What? {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} has not provided the extrapolation process? This hasn't occurred for hundreds of Light Calendar years!

t_ch: 不出所料。
t_en: As expected.

t_ch: 看来铁路不归雅努斯管。
t_en: It seems the railways lie beyond Janus's domain.

t_ch: 居然还有这种事，我开始好奇辅祭你的来历了…但别灰心，命运泰坦们并没有否定你的寻求，我相信，将来某日，你一定会得知它的所在。
t_en: Unbelievable! I'm growing curious about your origins, acolyte. But don't lose heart — the Fate Titans have not denied your pursuit. I'm sure you'll find your answers one day.

t_ch: 先不打扰了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 嗯…愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
t_en: Hmm... May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.

t_ch: 先不打扰了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 嗯…愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
t_en: Hmm... May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.

t_ch: 推演完成了，拿去吧，这是拓有结论的石板。
t_en: The extrapolation is complete. Here, take it — this slate bears the conclusion.

t_ch: 我想重玩之前的迷津！
t_en: I want to replay the maze!

t_ch: 呵，会把推演当做游乐的，寻遍这雅努萨波利斯，也就辅祭你一人了。好在欧洛尼斯也身在三相殿中，借助它的权能，溯回记忆中的迷津不成问题，只是——
t_en: Ha, treating divination as amusement — among all of Janusopolis, you're the only acolyte who would do so. Fortunately, Oronyx resides within the Temple of the Three Fates, and with their authority, retracing the labyrinth of memories should be no issue. However —

t_ch: 我不是欧洛尼斯祭司，没法控制它具体回到哪一个委托的状态。若是腻了，不妨再来找我换一个——这方法是我偷偷跟岁月祭司学来的，你可别往外说啊。
t_en: I am no priest of Oronyx, so I can't precisely control which state of a request we return to. If you tire of it, feel free to come back and ask me to change it. This trick? I secretly learned it from the Priest of Time, so don't go spreading it around, okay?

t_ch: 「欧洛尼斯，我呼唤你！——激起往西的涟漪！」
t_en: "Oronyx, I summon thee! Stir up ripples of past referee!"

t_ch: 每次念祷言都感觉怪怪的，为什么一定要往西呢？
t_en: It feels odd every time I recite the chant. Why does it need a referee?

t_ch: 我想重玩之前的迷津！
t_en: I want to replay the maze!

t_ch: 腻了？那我们就换一个。「——激起往西的涟漪！」每次念祷言都感觉怪怪的，为什么一定要往西呢？
t_en: Bored already? Let's change another one. "Stir up ripples of past referee!" It feels odd every time I recite the chant. Why does it need a referee?

t_ch: 球还在原位，但若虫不在。上面有一行小字——「我先去吃个饭，等会回来」
t_en: The iron ball hasn't moved, but the nymph has disappeared. A tiny message on the ball says: "Taking a lunch break, be right back"

t_ch: 你被旋转的铁球砸晕了——
t_en: You got knocked out by a spinning iron ball—

t_ch: 你仿佛听见有虫子鸣叫着「好砸，好砸」。
t_en: You seemingly hear a bug chirping, "Nice hit, nice hit."

t_ch: 就算是虫子也该分清有些话可以说，有些话不可以说啊！
t_en: Even bugs should know when to keep their mouths shut!

t_ch: 哗啦啦？！居然躲过了我的铁球？
t_en: *whoosh* You actually dodged my iron ball?

t_ch: 哗啦…也许你只是亡魂？大铁球从你身上穿过去了。原来如此，我逐渐理解了一切。
t_en: *whoosh* Or maybe you're just a ghost? The iron ball passed right through you. I see, it's all starting to make sense now.

t_ch: 是虫子的尸体在说话？
t_en: Is that the corpse of a bug talking?

t_ch: 我用球棒帮你加深理解。
t_en: Let me help you understand with my bat.

t_ch: 唔，对不起对不起。都怪我这大发声器官，太久没和真人交流，「说都不会话」了…嘿嘿。既然是活人，我就不该拦你了——上面有宝物，快上去看看吧！
t_en: Uh, sorry, sorry. It's all my fault — this loud mouth of mine. It's been so long since I've talked to a real person, I barely remember how to speak... Hehe. Since you're alive, I shouldn't stop you — there's treasure up there, go take a look!

t_ch: 哗啦~欢迎来到迷阵屋子。对这些球熟悉吗？只要借助{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的力量让它们落到洞内——
t_en: *whoosh* Welcome to the maze house. Are you familiar with these balls? Just use the power of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to get them into the holes—

t_ch: ——坏啦！太久没看见活人，我都忘了确认了…你应该会用欧洛尼斯祷言吧？
t_en: —Uh oh! It's been so long since I've seen a living person, I forgot to check... You know how to use the Oronyx's Prayer, right?

t_ch: 我会。
t_en: That I do.

t_ch: 要是我不会呢？
t_en: What if I don't?

t_ch: 哗啦，完蛋。我可教不了你。再见，很高兴认识你。
t_en: *whoosh* We're doomed. I can't teach you. Goodbye, it was nice meeting you.

t_ch: 开玩笑的，其实我会。
t_en: Just kidding, I actually know how to use it.

t_ch: 没关系，就在刚才我悟了。
t_en: It's fine, I just figured it out.

t_ch: 吓死我了…我就说嘛，会用祷言又不是什么稀奇事。听好，只要让<color=#dbc291ff>所有的球都停在压力板上</color>，就算完成啦！
t_en: You almost got me... Anyway, using the prayer isn't such a big deal. Listen carefully, as long as you make <color=#dbc291ff>all the balls stop on the pressure plates</color>, it's done!

t_ch: 你瞧，球在这里——
t_en: Look, the balls are here—

t_ch: 还有这边！
t_en: And here!

t_ch: 交给你啦，我就在这飞来飞去。哗啦啦——
t_en: It's up to you now, I'll be flying around here. *whoosh*

t_ch: 哗啦啦——为何欧洛尼斯的祭司要设置谜题，又为何将谜题留给未来的人呢？
t_en: *whoosh* Why did the priest of Oronyx set up a riddle, and why did he leave it for future generations?

t_ch: 他总是说让我耐心等，迟早会有人来解开这些「刻意」的谜题，我原本是不信的。直到你出现了，哗啦啦。
t_en: He always tells me to be patient, that sooner or later someone will come to solve these "deliberate" puzzles. I didn't believe it at first. Until you showed up. *whoosh*

t_ch: 瞧，我没骗你吧？这还只是一小部分，那位欧洛尼斯的老祭司还留下了两道谜题——
t_en: See? I wasn't lying. This is just a small part. The old priest of Oronyx left two more puzzles behind—

t_ch: 哗啦——好让人怀念的氛围，我有多久没回这里了？
t_en: *whoosh* Such a nostalgic atmosphere. How long has it been since I've been here?

t_ch: 为了谜题能够继续，不要走来时路，我们从另外一侧绕过去吧！
t_en: To keep the puzzle going, let's not take the same route back. We'll go around from the other side!

t_ch: 哗啦，让人想起了过往呢，但我不可以一直呆在过去的回忆中，我们继续吧。
t_en: *whoosh* It brings back memories. But I can't stay in the past forever. Let's move on.

t_ch: 见鬼，怎么多了个塑像？
t_en: Darn it, why is there another statue?

t_ch: 这…也是舞台装置做到的？
t_en: Is this... also part of the stage mechanism?

t_ch: 舞台装置？我不知道你在说什么，你说是就是吧。
t_en: Stage mechanism? I don't know what you're talking about, but if you say so, then sure.

t_ch: 记得那老祭司说过，谜题会随着岁月不断扩张…看来就是这么个意思了，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祭司，厉害吧？
t_en: I remember the old priest saying that the puzzles would keep expanding over time... Looks like this is what he meant. The priest of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} — impressive, isn't it?

t_ch: 事不宜迟，我们开始吧！球的位置要记好哦！
t_en: No time to waste. Let's begin! Be sure to remember the position of the balls!

t_ch: 另外，<color=#dbc291ff>浮台现在还不会动</color>呢，不知道那边的祭器是不是和它有关。
t_en: Also, <color=#dbc291ff>the floating platform isn't moving yet</color>. Maybe it's connected to that ritual vessel over there.

t_ch: 想必这样的谜题也难不倒你吧，加油，哗啦啦——
t_en: I bet this puzzle won't stump you. Go for it! *whoosh*

t_ch: 你知道吗，曾经我也向往泰坦的伟力，直到我听说老祭司也记不起昨天是哪只脚先迈进的神殿，我就对{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的奇迹产生了怀疑。
t_en: You know, I once admired the power of the Titans — until I heard that the old priest couldn't even remember which foot stepped into the temple first yesterday. That's when I began doubting the miracles of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 哗啦啦，好多东西呀。我都不知道，祭司居然收集了这么多稀奇古怪的东西吗？
t_en: *whoosh* Look at all this stuff! I had no idea the priest collected so many bizarre items.

t_ch: 那个人一直神神秘秘的。听说，这里除了存放着他一生的积蓄，他还把最重要的宝物也藏在了这里…就连陪着他时间最久的我都不知道是什么。
t_en: That person was always so mysterious. They say this place not only holds all his life savings, but also his most prized treasure... Even I, who spent the most time with him, don't know what it is.

t_ch: 好啦，接着解谜吧，我先飞回去等你，记得要绕回去哦？哗啦。
t_en: Alright, back to solving puzzles. I'll fly back and wait for you. Don't forget to circle back. *whoosh*

t_ch: 刚刚有个怪物差点坐浮台上来了，已经被我用大铁球撞进冥河里去啦。
t_en: A monster almost got onto the floating platform just now, but I knocked it into the River of Souls with a giant iron ball.

t_ch: 哗啦！怎么这么多东西啊！
t_en: *whoosh* Why is there so much stuff here!?

t_ch: 总共有一、二、三…三个球！
t_en: There are a total of one, two, three... three balls!

t_ch: 在那边的是…风口吗？虽然现在还没有打开，但是用风或许可以把球吹跑？
t_en: Is that... a wind vent over there? It's not active yet, but maybe we could use the wind to blow the balls away?

t_ch: 还有这满地的杂物…这么不想被人解开，肯定是最后的谜题了！解开它解开它，老祭司家就没有余粮啦。
t_en: And all this junk on the floor... If they didn't want anyone solving this, it must be the final puzzle! Solve it, and the old priest won't have any rations left!

t_ch: 啊~嚏！
t_en: Ah-choo!

t_ch: 唔，死去的祭司在念叨我——也可能是我对花粉过敏…明明我是只虫。
t_en: Ugh, the dead priest must be cursing me — or maybe I'm just allergic to pollen. Strange, since I'm an insect.

t_ch: 哗啦啦，好大的宝箱。恭喜你，大家伙！让我们瞧瞧，祭司他到底藏了什么东西，竟然连我都不给看……
t_en: *whoosh* That's a huge chest. Congratulations, big guy! Let's see what the priest hid inside that even I wasn't allowed to see...

t_ch: 哗啦——
t_en: *whoosh*

t_ch: 什么玩意啊这是——
t_en: What the heck is this—

t_ch: 这位祭司还真了解你。
t_en: This priest really knew you well.

t_ch: 哗啦！都离开这么久了，几句话就让我想起那些日子…说我顽皮的部分是他捏造的，让你产生误会了，不好意思哦，哗啦。
t_en: *whoosh* Even after all this time, a few words bring back those days... Sorry for the misunderstanding about me being mischievous. He made that up. My apologies. *whoosh*

t_ch: 走，跟我去奥赫玛。
t_en: Come, let's go to Okhema together.

t_ch: 我记得这里的衣匠应该是在……
t_en: If memory serves me right, the garmentmaker here should be...

t_ch: 哗啦啦…不不不，别听他的，我还没玩够呢。
t_en: *whoosh* No, no, no, don't listen to him! I'm not done playing yet.

t_ch: 而且，虽然我感觉到冥河水开始流动了，但是他的亡魂应该还没来得及离开。我想等他彻底去往冥界之后，我再离开这里……
t_en: Besides, even though I feel the water from River of Souls starting to flow, his soul likely hasn't left yet. I want to wait until he's completely moved on to the nether realm before I leave this place...

t_ch: 总之，你完成了我伙伴的遗愿，谢谢你啦！哗啦。那些利衡币你可得省着点花哦，别为了买什么奇怪的升值产品给赔光了，这可是他作为冒牌祭司的经验谈！
t_en: Anyway, you've fulfilled my companion's last wish. Thank you. *whoosh* And be sure to spend those Balance Coins wisely. Don't blow them on some weird "investment" product. That's advice from his experience as a phony priest!

t_ch: 你自己一只虫真的不要紧？
t_en: Are you sure you'll be okay on your own as just a bug?

t_ch: 没事没事，你也见到他写的了，我有大铁球呢！
t_en: No worries, no worries. You saw it written, right? I've got a giant iron ball!

t_ch: 再说了，我这么不起眼，也没有人会闲到到处去找虫子，对吧？
t_en: Besides, I'm so inconspicuous. Nobody would bother looking for a bug, right?

t_ch: 另外，偷偷告诉你…这个房间还有着<color=#dbc291ff>另一种特别的样貌</color>，我曾经偶然瞥见过它的幻影，连岁月的祭司都没能发现。
t_en: Oh, and just between you and me... This room has <color=#dbc291ff>another hidden form</color>. I once caught a glimpse of its phantom, something even the Priest of Time didn't discover.

t_ch: 能够使它显现的谜题已经在刚刚的房间里布置好了，但解答的方式好像和之前不一样。感觉<color=#dbc291ff>相关的线索压根就不在这两个房间里</color>……
t_en: The puzzle to reveal it is set up in the previous room, but the solution seems to differ from before. It feels like <color=#dbc291ff>the clues aren't even in these two rooms</color>...

t_ch: 要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
t_en: If you're interested, explore it yourself. I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*

t_ch: 顺便一说，你试过用球撞怪物吗？可好玩了！就像是你刚来的…啊不，我什么也没说。
t_en: By the way, have you tried using the ball to hit monsters? It's so fun! Just like when you first arrived... Oops, I didn't say anything.

t_ch: 我还给每个招式都起了名字，左旋球叫「电光石火」，右旋球叫「石破天惊」，直球叫「直球」。
t_en: I even named each move! The left spin is "Flash Strike," the right spin is "Earth-Shattering," and the straight shot is just "Straight Shot."

t_ch: 哗啦，滚过头了。
t_en: *whoosh* It rolled too far.

t_ch: 再试一次吧！这次抓住时机<color=#dbc291ff>用祷言让它停住！</color>你可以的！
t_en: Try again! This time, seize the moment and <color=#dbc291ff>use the prayer to stop it!</color> You've got this!

t_ch: 停住了！你真厉害！不是敷衍你哦？连设计谜题的祭司自己都把握不好时机呢，哗啦。
t_en: You stopped it! Amazing! I'm not just flattering you. Even the priest who designed the puzzles couldn't time it perfectly. *whoosh*

t_ch: 改主意啦？好，我在这等你——
t_en: Changed your mind? Okay, I'll wait here—

t_ch: 门开了——这边这边——
t_en: The door's open — this way, this way—

t_ch: 其实我也试过自己解开谜题，但很可惜我的分类是荧虫，头上没有犄角，撞不碎塑像。
t_en: I did try to solve the puzzle myself once, but unfortunately, as a glowworm, I don't have horns to smash the statues.

t_ch: 啊呀，祷言断掉了耶。看来<color=#dbc291ff>不能让球和球撞到一起</color>呢，哗啦。
t_en: Ah, the prayer broke off. It seems like <color=#dbc291ff>the balls can't collide with each other</color>. *whoosh*

t_ch: 哗啦啦，门开啦——悄悄跟你说，即使不解迷，我也可以从旁边的缝隙飞进去。
t_en: *whoosh* The door's open! Just so you know, even if we didn't solve the puzzle, I could've slipped through the cracks.

t_ch: 可惜你还活着，要是你是亡魂，就也能直接钻进来了…哗啦。
t_en: Too bad you're still alive. If you were a ghost, you could've squeezed in... *whoosh*

t_ch: 风——好——喧嚣——啊——哗啦——
t_en: The wind—so—loud—ahhh— *whoosh*

t_ch: 我没事，营造一下气氛而已，哗啦。用它<color=#dbc291ff>让球改道</color>吧！
t_en: I'm fine, just setting the mood. *whoosh* Use it to <color=#dbc291ff>redirect the ball</color>!

t_ch: 咦？这扇门…好像可以自由开关。
t_en: Huh? This door... seems to open and close freely.

t_ch: 或许可以<color=#dbc291ff>用它来挡住球</color>？多试试看吧！
t_en: Maybe you can <color=#dbc291ff>use it to block the ball</color>? Give it a few tries!

t_ch: 哗啦，这种洁净的感觉，真让虫心旷神怡——
t_en: *whoosh* This clean feeling—it's so refreshing for a bug—

t_ch: 和外出旅行之后，回家做完大扫除的感觉一样呢——祭司说的，我不懂，哗啦。
t_en: It's like coming home from a trip and doing a thorough cleaning. That's what the priest said — I wouldn't know. *whoosh*

t_ch: 哗啦，我懂，用球撞东西的爽快感实在令虫欲罢不能。
t_en: *whoosh* I get it. The thrill of smashing things with the ball is truly irresistible for a bug.

t_ch: 哇哇，这浮台是载人的，不是投石机啦，举不起来的！被球压住就动不了啦，哗啦——
t_en: Whoa, this platform is for carrying people, not a catapult! It can't lift off when the ball's pressing down on it. *whoosh*

t_ch: 门开啦，哗啦！你好厉害啊！不过…想了想，我给了你这么多提示，给我一枚利衡币也不算过分吧？
t_en: The door's open. *whoosh* You're amazing! But... now that I think about it, after giving you so many hints, don't you think I deserve a Balance Coin?

t_ch: 哗啦～可是这里连个需要钱的商人都没有…这些钱你留着吧，心里惦记着我就好。
t_en: *whoosh* But there's no merchant here who even needs money... Keep it for yourself, and just think of me fondly.

t_ch: 铁球压住了浮台。你试着推了推，它纹丝不动。附近好像看不到什么机关。
t_en: The iron ball pins down the platform. Try as you might, it won't move. No obvious mechanism can be found nearby.

t_ch: 先去做其他该做的事吧。说不定过一阵子，它就会自己长腿跑掉了…
t_en: Let's focus on other tasks for now. Who knows, it might magically grow legs and move itself later...

t_ch: 要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
t_en: If you're interested, explore it yourself. I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*

t_ch: 要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。
t_en: If you're interested, explore it yourself.

t_ch: 其实我已经去过了…
t_en: Yeah, I've actually done that...

t_ch: 哗啦啦…真的吗？岁月的祭司都没你厉害。
t_en: *whoosh* Really? You're even more capable than the Priest of Time.

t_ch: 好，我这就去看看。
t_en: Alright, I'll go check it out.

t_ch: 不光要看，还要解谜哦，很难的，哗啦。
t_en: You'll need to solve puzzles too, not just look around. Challenging stuff. *whoosh*

t_ch: 我要去接着玩大铁球了！下次走路小心点嗷，哗啦啦~
t_en: I'm going back to play with the iron ball! Watch your step next time. *whoosh*

t_ch: 圣杯屹立于群山之间，海浪和鱼儿从中跃出——这是{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的象征。
t_en: Amidst mountains stands the Holy Grail, with leaping waves and fish — the symbol of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 这个房间的主人似乎信奉{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}满溢之杯{RUBY_E#}。在阳光明亮的黄金时代，海水曾经比现在更加澄澈。
t_en: The room's resident appears to follow the {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Chalice of Plenty{RUBY_E#}. During the radiant Golden Age, the oceans were more pristine than today.

t_ch: 桌上摆着尚未读完的书卷，还有尚未吃完的果盘。它们看上去都不像是经受过岁月侵蚀的模样。
t_en: On the table lies an unfinished scroll and a partially eaten fruit platter. Both appear untouched by time.

t_ch: 书卷和水果都保存得相当完好，仿佛房间的主人只是临时有事出门，随时可能回来继续手头的工作。
t_en: Both scrolls and fruits remain in pristine condition, suggesting the room's occupant merely stepped out briefly and might return at any time to resume their work.

t_ch: 皎洁的月光从窗外射入，如奶油花般涂抹在地上。
t_en: The bright moonlight shines through the window, spreading across the floor like creamy frosting.

t_ch: 于破败的古城中，你难得感受到了恬静。
t_en: In the dilapidated ancient city, you feel a rare sense of tranquility.

t_ch: 天父啊…伊来内呢？阁下，您有没有看到伊来内？
t_en: O, sky father... Where's Alain? {NICKNAME}, have you seen him?

t_ch: 他是负责看管火种匣的祭司，恐怕被困在了半神议院…外面黑潮肆虐，除了您，怕是没有别人能指望了…您能去找找他吗？
t_en: He's the priest in charge of Coreflame Caskets. I'm afraid he's trapped in the Demigod Council... The black tide is everywhere outside. If anyone can save him, it's you. Please... will you look for him?

t_ch: 我去看看吧。
t_en: I'll check it out.

t_ch: 太感谢了！愿天父看护您！
t_en: Thank you! May the sky father watch over you!

t_ch: 没有时间了…
t_en: There's no time...

t_ch: 我明白，我明白…现在谁也顾不得谁了。天父啊，但愿他去了别的避难地……
t_en: I know. I know... No one can afford to worry about anyone else right now. O, sky father, I hope he made it to another shelter...

t_ch: 呃啊…还是想不起来……
t_en: Ugh... I still can't remember...

t_ch: 呃啊…还没有起效吗…你…你是……
t_en: Ngh... It's still not working... You... who are you...?

t_ch: 你就是伊来内吗？
t_en: Are you Alain?

t_ch: 有人托我来救你。
t_en: Someone sent me to find you.

t_ch: 伊来内…我…？啊，是的…我是祭司伊来内。
t_en: Alain... I...? Ah, yes... I am Priest Alain.

t_ch: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下，那位继承了欧洛尼斯火种的黄金裔？真是天父显灵了，我刚唤取出这个「火种匣」，拜托您打开它吧！
t_en: You're... {NICKNAME}? The Chrysos Heir who inherited Oronyx's Coreflame? By the sky father's grace, I just retrieved this Coreflame Casket — please, open it!

t_ch: 里面藏了什么宝贝？
t_en: What kind of treasure's inside?

t_ch: 还是跑路保命要紧！
t_en: Forget that! Survival comes first!

t_ch: 天父曾将火种的余温赐予我们，当黑潮倾覆世界，它能庇佑人子一夕安存…这份「余火」，被元老们封存在了某个火种匣中。
t_en: The sky father once granted us the Coreflame's lingering warmth. When the black tide swallows the world, it will be the only thing that can give the children of humanity a brief respite... This "ember" is sealed inside one of these Caskets.

t_ch: 我也想赶紧逃跑…但找到它，就能让更多人免于痛苦。
t_en: I want to run, too... but if we find it, then we can save so many more lives.

t_ch: 开启火种匣需要欧洛尼斯的祷言，凯妮斯女士已死，元老和祭司也四散逃走，现在能打开它的只有您了——
t_en: Opening the Coreflame Casket requires Oronyx's prayer. Lady Caenis is dead, and the elders and priests have scattered... You're the only one left who can do it —

t_ch: 如果您仗义出手，我这有些他们没能带走的宝贝，全都归您！
t_en: If you help me, I'll give you something valuable — whatever the priests left behind, it's all yours!

t_ch: 义不容辞。
t_en: I won't turn my back on this.

t_ch: 太好了，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
t_en: That's a relief! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket.

t_ch: 早说有奖励嘛！
t_en: You should've said there was a reward sooner!

t_ch: 事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
t_en: No time to waste! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket!

t_ch: 我还有别的事…
t_en: I've got other matters to handle...

t_ch: 我明白，事态紧急，{NICKNAME}阁下一定有更重要的事去做。愿天父庇佑您！
t_en: I understand. The situation is urgent everywhere. You must have more pressing matters to attend to. {NICKNAME}, may the sky father guide you!

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 吕枯耳戈斯元老把秘术锁传授给元老院后，他们也会用火种匣寄存些不便透露给外界的私人物品，这大概也是其中之一。
t_en: After Elder Lycurgus taught the art of arcane seals to the Council of Elders, they also began storing personal belongings in the Coreflame Caskets — items they preferred to keep hidden from the outside world. This is likely one of them.

t_ch: 所以余火到底在哪里？
t_en: So where exactly is the ember?

t_ch: 这玩意儿能保护些什么？
t_en: What can this thing even protect?

t_ch: 可惜，只有凯妮斯女士和她的那帮「清洗者」心腹，才清楚每个火种匣里究竟是什么。
t_en: Unfortunately, only Lady Caenis and her inner circle of "Cleaners" know what's inside each Coreflame Casket.

t_ch: 目前统计在册的火种匣共有三百二十个，我依据档案中的信息排除了大半…余火一定在剩下的这些火种匣里！
t_en: There are a total of <unbreak>320</unbreak> registered Coreflame Caskets. I've managed to eliminate most of them based on archival records... The ember must be in one of the remaining ones!

t_ch: 拜托您先解锁下个火种匣…这段时间里，我会继续筛查。
t_en: Please, unlock the next Coreflame Casket. I'll keep sorting through the records in the meantime.

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 难道出货了？！
t_en: Did we pull the jackpot!?

t_ch: 别一惊一乍啊。
t_en: Don't scare me like that.

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，我这人就是容易大惊小怪。
t_en: Sorry, sorry! I tend to get overexcited.

t_ch: 这是之前挂在神殿亭廊里的黄金世古画「欢宴之盟」。它记录了诸多城邦签订盟约时，云石天宫初次奠基的场景，曾被拍出千万利衡币的高价！
t_en: This is Feast of the Covenant, an ancient mural of the Era Chrysea that once hung in the temple pavilion. It depicts the foundation of Marmoreal Palace during the signing of a great city-state alliance. It was once auctioned for millions of Balance Coins!

t_ch: 奇怪，记得掌账祭司明明说它已经被「贼灵」偷走了啊……
t_en: That's odd... The accounting priest claimed it was stolen by the Spirithief.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯，平账的神！
t_en: Bartholos, the god of accounting!

t_ch: 难怪感觉哪都空空的…
t_en: No wonder it feels so empty...

t_ch: 呃啊…时间不多了，拜托您抓紧时间看下一个匣子吧！
t_en: Ugh... Time is running out. Please, let's move on to the next Casket!

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 您、您怎么抢我的台词呢！
t_en: Wait — why are you stealing my line!?

t_ch: 这回总该开出来了吧？
t_en: This has to be the one, right?

t_ch: 我这就看看…啊，这是！！！
t_en: Let me check... Ah, this is—!!!

t_ch: 这是天父的赎罪膏油…只要为泰坦断崖的篝火添加膏油，天父就会原谅一切罪过，在末日中准许你前往下一个黄金世。
t_en: This is the Atoning Balm of the sky father... We claim that just a single drop of this into the bonfire in Titan Cliff will atone for all your sins, and the sky father will forgive you and grant you passage to the next Era Chrysea in the apocalypse.

t_ch: 虽然惭愧，但这确实是我们重要的收入来源。
t_en: Embarrassing as it is, this is one of our main sources of income.

t_ch: 这东西就别放在火种匣里了！
t_en: Why even bother keeping this in the Coreflame Casket!

t_ch: 还愣着干什么，赶紧点上啊。
t_en: What are you waiting for? Next!

t_ch: 确实… 每分每秒，圣城里都有人死去。
t_en: Yeah... Every second, people in the holy city are dying.

t_ch: 时间不多了——{NICKNAME}阁下，拜托您打开下一个火种匣吧！
t_en: There's no time — {NICKNAME}, please, open the next Coreflame Casket!

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 找到了不得了的东西啊。唉，想当初，我也差点成了他们中的一员……
t_en: Now this is something big. Heh... Y'know, I almost ended up like them once...

t_ch: 你也是清洗者？
t_en: Wait, are you a Cleaner too?

t_ch: 这难道是个圈套…
t_en: Could this be... a trap?

t_ch: 不必紧张。我受大司铎委派在此管理火种匣，多少知晓了一些秘辛，凯妮斯女士也曾因此向我抛出橄榄枝——说实话，元老院的一席之地，的确十分诱人。
t_en: No need to be on edge. The Chaplain assigned me to oversee these Coreflame Caskets, so I know a few secrets. Even Lady Caenis extended me an invitation — honestly, a seat in the Council of Elders is indeed a tempting offer.

t_ch: 可…成为「清洗者」虽然能够继承大量知识和记忆，却也意味着自己独有的记忆将被淡化、抹去。
t_en: But... becoming a Cleaner means inheriting vast knowledge and memories — at the cost of losing your own.

t_ch: 我就是为了不上战场才来当祭司的，这些事情…对我来说果然还是太勉强了。
t_en: I became a priest so I wouldn't have to fight on the battlefield. This... This is just too much for me.

t_ch: 我又筛选出一批火种匣，还剩下七十二个需要确认。该死，这得开到什么时候？可是我…嘶……
t_en: I've sorted through another batch of Coreflame Caskets. Still <unbreak>72</unbreak> more to go. Darn it, how long is this gonna take? But I... ngh...

t_ch: 你不舒服吗？
t_en: Hey, you okay?

t_ch: 啊，不…没关系。不打紧。请您继续解开下一个火种匣吧！
t_en: Ah, no, no, it's fine. I'm fine. Please, let's keep going. Open the next Casket.

t_ch: 啊…你…你是……？
t_en: Ah... you... you're...?

t_ch: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下？对了，火种匣，要继续打开火种匣。
t_en: You're... {NICKNAME}? Right... the Caskets. I need to keep opening them.

t_ch: 这个…是考卷？不…经卷…不对……
t_en: Wait, this is... an exam paper? No... a scripture? No, that can't be right...

t_ch: 你真没事？感觉不大对劲…
t_en: You sure you're okay? You don't seem like yourself...

t_ch: 没有一惊一乍，好不习惯。
t_en: Wow, no sudden outbursts? Feels kinda weird.

t_ch: 不必担心，{NICKNAME}阁下…我其实感觉好多了。
t_en: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}... I actually feel much better now.

t_ch: 想起来了，这是刻法勒的谕示集，每个侍奉天父的祭司，都要在受洗礼前对它宣誓虔诚。
t_en: I remember now. This is the oracles of Kephale. Every priest serving the sky father must swear their devotion to them before baptism.

t_ch: 从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
t_en: When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.

t_ch: 对不起，阿普列尤斯老师…我太害怕了。害怕面对黑潮，害怕直面死亡…可现在，就像你们一样，这一天还是来到了我的头上。
t_en: I'm sorry, Mr. Apuleius... I was scared. Scared of the black tide. Scared of death. But now, just like you... my time has come.

t_ch: 我想至少今天，至少这次…呃啊…可档案里的线索都用尽了，我还是想不起来…找不出那个火种匣。时间不多了…果然，我还是和以前一样没用……
t_en: At least for today, at least this time — ugh... I've gone through all the records, but I still can't remember... I still can't find the right Coreflame Casket. We're running out of time... I really am useless, just like before...

t_ch: 再试试，总能找到的。
t_en: Try again. We'll find it.

t_ch: 这又不是你的错……
t_en: This isn't your fault...

t_ch: 时间宝贵，别自怨自艾了。
t_en: We don't have time for this. Focus.

t_ch: 谢谢…您说的是。我确实还不愿放弃…您愿意再尝试的话，我会再唤取一个火种匣，拜托您了！
t_en: Thank you... You're right. I don't want to give up yet. If you're willing to keep going, I'll summon another Coreflame Casket — please, I'm counting on you!

t_ch: 我？我这是在…我是……
t_en: I... what am I...? I am...?

t_ch: 祭司难以置信地抚摸着自己的脸颊，随后突然镇静下来，好像接受了某种现实。
t_en: The priest touches his face in disbelief. Then, suddenly, he calms, as if accepting some unknown reality.

t_ch: 我是…伊来内。
t_en: I am... Alain.

t_ch: 这次匣子里面是余火吗？
t_en: Is this one holding the ember?

t_ch: 不必看了…这不是装余火的匣子。我已经想起余火在哪里了。
t_en: No need to check... This isn't the right Casket. I remember where the ember is now.

t_ch: 封存余火的火种匣由三层秘术锁保护，{NICKNAME}阁下，只差最后一步…相信您一定能把它打开。
t_en: The Coreflame Casket holding the ember is sealed behind three layers of arcane seals. {NICKNAME}, this is the final step... I know you can do it.

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 一枚余火缓缓下落，降在伊来内的掌心。
t_en: A single ember drifts downward, landing gently in Alain's palm.

t_ch: 没想到有一天，我也能触碰到天父的火种。
t_en: Never thought I'd live to touch the sky father's Coreflame...

t_ch: 这次也没有大呼小叫。
t_en: Huh. No dramatic reactions this time.

t_ch: 好欣慰，你成长了。
t_en: Glad to see you've grown.

t_ch: 呵呵…原来我是那样一个人吗？
t_en: Heh... So that's the kind of person I was, huh?

t_ch: 不重要了…请您将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
t_en: It doesn't matter anymore... Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

t_ch: 是撤退的时候了。
t_en: It's time to go.

t_ch: 我吗？…不必了。
t_en: Me? No, I'll stay...

t_ch: 为什么不一起去？
t_en: Why aren't you coming with us?

t_ch: 时间已经不多了…属于我的时间。
t_en: Because... my time is almost up.

t_ch: 只有凯妮斯女士和「清洗者」知晓余火所在的火种匣。所以在您来之前，我利用被封存的一份遗物，独自完成了成为「清洗者」的仪式。
t_en: Only Lady Caenis and the Cleaner knew which Casket held the ember. So before you arrived, I used a sealed relic to perform the Cleaner's ritual on myself.

t_ch: 时间紧迫，仪式并不完全，破碎的记忆像潮汐，要把沙滩上的一切抹去…好在最后，它也将那个答案送到了我的面前。
t_en: The ritual was rushed, incomplete. My memories are breaking apart, like waves washing over the shore, erasing everything in their path... But in the end, at least it gave me the answer.

t_ch: 「再创世」就要完成了…
t_en: The Era Nova is almost complete...

t_ch: 为什么要做到这个地步？
t_en: Why go this far?

t_ch: 我还能开更多火种匣！
t_en: I can open more Coreflame Caskets!

t_ch: 您已经为我们做得太多，{NICKNAME}阁下…而且，时间的确也不容许我们打开它们。
t_en: You've already done so much for us, {NICKNAME}... Besides, we don't have time to open them all.

t_ch: 「再创世」——我也曾抱着这样的期盼活着。但当黑潮真的来临，看着黑潮吞没同伴，听到他们的惨叫…我承认，我还是…怕死。
t_en: "Era Nova" — I once lived with that hope, too. But when the black tide came, when I watched it consume my friends and heard their screams... I won't lie. I was still afraid.

t_ch: 怕死亡那一瞬间的痛苦，也怕死后漫长黑暗中的了无知觉。尽管也有人许诺了彼岸……
t_en: Afraid of the pain in that final moment, afraid of the endless dark that follows. Even if some promised salvation beyond...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您原谅，这可能只是一个胆小鬼将死前的胡话——
t_en: {NICKNAME}, forgive me. These are just the ramblings of a coward at death's door—

t_ch: 假使世界会在英雄的眼中重塑，那从未在他们眼中出现过的我们，是否也能得到来世的接引？
t_en: If the world is reshaped through a hero's eyes... then what about those of us who were never seen? Will we have a place in the next life?

t_ch: 那刻夏证明过。我相信他。
t_en: Anaxa proved it's possible. I believe in him.

t_ch: 哈哈。那就…借您吉言。
t_en: Haha... Well then, I'll take your word for it.

t_ch: 希望…我们能在西风的尽头…在那个阳光明媚、没有伤痛的世界重新相识。
t_en: Maybe... we'll meet again, beyond the western winds... in a world of light, free from pain.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你…帮助我做了件能让自己感到佩服的事。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Thank you. You helped me do something I can be proud of.

t_ch: …我无法保证。
t_en: ...I can't make that promise.

t_ch: 感谢您坦诚相待。因此，即便只有一线生机，我也希望能尽力抓住。
t_en: I appreciate your honesty. That's why even if there's only the slimmest chance... I want to hold onto it.

t_ch: 一生着实过于仓促…{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你，帮助我做了一件能让自己感到佩服的事情。
t_en: Life is far too short... {NICKNAME}, thank you for helping me do something I can be proud of.

t_ch: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
t_en: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

t_ch: 时间不多了，请您尽快将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
t_en: There's no time. Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

t_ch: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
t_en: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

t_ch: 这团由伊来内的生命换来的「余火」，就这样悄无声息地融入光芒，转瞬间消失不见。不知是否是错觉…一股暖流拂过你的面庞。
t_en: The ember, paid for with Alain's life, melts soundlessly into the light, vanishing in an instant. And yet... was it just imagination, or did a warm breeze brush against your cheek?

t_ch: …「愚不可及」。
t_en: ...Unsurpassed idiocy.

t_ch: 但愿一切都是值得的。
t_en: Let's hope it was worth it.

t_ch: 好了，去帮助下一个人吧。
t_en: Alright. Let's find the next person who needs help.

t_ch: 遗体尚有余温，身上可见与黑潮怪物搏斗留下的伤痕。
t_en: The body is still warm, bearing the scars of battle against the creatures of the black tide.

t_ch: 他以这种方式为自己写下了最后的结局。
t_en: This is how he chose to write his final chapter.

t_ch: 打开第一层了。接下来的秘术锁可能会越来越复杂，请小心应对。
t_en: The first layer's down. The next ones will only get more complex — stay sharp.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您用欧洛尼斯的力量，打开最后一重秘术锁吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, use Oronyx's power to break the final arcane seal!

t_ch: 天父啊…伊来内呢？阁下，您有没有看到伊来内？
t_en: O, sky father... Where's Alain? {NICKNAME}, have you seen him?

t_ch: 他是负责看管火种匣的祭司，恐怕被困在了半神议院…外面黑潮肆虐，除了您，怕是没有别人能指望了…您能去找找他吗？
t_en: He's the priest in charge of Coreflame Caskets. I'm afraid he's trapped in the Demigod Council... The black tide is everywhere outside. If anyone can save him, it's you. Please... will you look for him?

t_ch: 我去看看吧。
t_en: I'll check it out.

t_ch: 太感谢了！愿天父看护您！
t_en: Thank you! May the sky father watch over you!

t_ch: 没有时间了…
t_en: There's no time...

t_ch: 我明白，我明白…现在谁也顾不得谁了。天父啊，但愿他去了别的避难地……
t_en: I know. I know... No one can afford to worry about anyone else right now. O, sky father, I hope he made it to another shelter...

t_ch: 呃啊…还是想不起来……
t_en: Ugh... I still can't remember...

t_ch: 呃啊…还没有起效吗…你…你是……
t_en: Ngh... It's still not working... You... who are you...?

t_ch: 你就是伊来内吗？
t_en: Are you Alain?

t_ch: 有人托我来救你。
t_en: Someone sent me to find you.

t_ch: 伊来内…我…？啊，是的…我是祭司伊来内。
t_en: Alain... I...? Ah, yes... I am Priest Alain.

t_ch: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下，那位继承了欧洛尼斯火种的黄金裔？真是天父显灵了，我刚唤取出这个「火种匣」，拜托您打开它吧！
t_en: You're... {NICKNAME}? The Chrysos Heir who inherited Oronyx's Coreflame? By the sky father's grace, I just retrieved this Coreflame Casket — please, open it!

t_ch: 里面藏了什么宝贝？
t_en: What kind of treasure's inside?

t_ch: 还是跑路保命要紧！
t_en: Forget that! Survival comes first!

t_ch: 天父曾将火种的余温赐予我们，当黑潮倾覆世界，它能庇佑人子一夕安存…这份「余火」，被元老们封存在了某个火种匣中。
t_en: The sky father once granted us the Coreflame's lingering warmth. When the black tide swallows the world, it will be the only thing that can give the children of humanity a brief respite... This "ember" is sealed inside one of these Caskets.

t_ch: 我也想赶紧逃跑…但找到它，就能让更多人免于痛苦。
t_en: I want to run, too... but if we find it, then we can save so many more lives.

t_ch: 开启火种匣需要欧洛尼斯的祷言，凯妮斯女士已死，元老和祭司也四散逃走，现在能打开它的只有您了——
t_en: Opening the Coreflame Casket requires Oronyx's prayer. Lady Caenis is dead, and the elders and priests have scattered... You're the only one left who can do it —

t_ch: 如果您仗义出手，我这有些他们没能带走的宝贝，全都归您！
t_en: If you help me, I'll give you something valuable — whatever the priests left behind, it's all yours!

t_ch: 义不容辞。
t_en: I won't turn my back on this.

t_ch: 太好了，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
t_en: That's a relief! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket.

t_ch: 早说有奖励嘛！
t_en: You should've said there was a reward sooner!

t_ch: 事不宜迟，{NICKNAME}阁下，请您打开这个火种匣试试吧。
t_en: No time to waste! {NICKNAME}, please, try opening this Casket!

t_ch: 我还有别的事…
t_en: I've got other matters to handle...

t_ch: 我明白，事态紧急，{NICKNAME}阁下一定有更重要的事去做。愿天父庇佑您！
t_en: I understand. The situation is urgent everywhere. You must have more pressing matters to attend to. {NICKNAME}, may the sky father guide you!

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 吕枯耳戈斯元老把秘术锁传授给元老院后，他们也会用火种匣寄存些不便透露给外界的私人物品，这大概也是其中之一。
t_en: After Elder Lycurgus taught the art of arcane seals to the Council of Elders, they also began storing personal belongings in the Coreflame Caskets — items they preferred to keep hidden from the outside world. This is likely one of them.

t_ch: 所以余火到底在哪里？
t_en: So where exactly is the ember?

t_ch: 这玩意儿能保护些什么？
t_en: What can this thing even protect?

t_ch: 可惜，只有凯妮斯女士和她的那帮「清洗者」心腹，才清楚每个火种匣里究竟是什么。
t_en: Unfortunately, only Lady Caenis and her inner circle of "Cleaners" know what's inside each Coreflame Casket.

t_ch: 目前统计在册的火种匣共有三百二十个，我依据档案中的信息排除了大半…余火一定在剩下的这些火种匣里！
t_en: There are a total of <unbreak>320</unbreak> registered Coreflame Caskets. I've managed to eliminate most of them based on archival records... The ember must be in one of the remaining ones!

t_ch: 拜托您先解锁下个火种匣…这段时间里，我会继续筛查。
t_en: Please, unlock the next Coreflame Casket. I'll keep sorting through the records in the meantime.

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 难道出货了？！
t_en: Did we pull the jackpot!?

t_ch: 别一惊一乍啊。
t_en: Don't scare me like that.

t_ch: 抱歉抱歉，我这人就是容易大惊小怪。
t_en: Sorry, sorry! I tend to get overexcited.

t_ch: 这是之前挂在神殿亭廊里的黄金世古画「欢宴之盟」。它记录了诸多城邦签订盟约时，云石天宫初次奠基的场景，曾被拍出千万利衡币的高价！
t_en: This is Feast of the Covenant, an ancient mural of the Era Chrysea that once hung in the temple pavilion. It depicts the foundation of Marmoreal Palace during the signing of a great city-state alliance. It was once auctioned for millions of Balance Coins!

t_ch: 奇怪，记得掌账祭司明明说它已经被「贼灵」偷走了啊……
t_en: That's odd... The accounting priest claimed it was stolen by the Spirithief.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯，平账的神！
t_en: Bartholos, the god of accounting!

t_ch: 难怪感觉哪都空空的…
t_en: No wonder it feels so empty...

t_ch: 呃啊…时间不多了，拜托您抓紧时间看下一个匣子吧！
t_en: Ugh... Time is running out. Please, let's move on to the next Casket!

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 您、您怎么抢我的台词呢！
t_en: Wait — why are you stealing my line!?

t_ch: 这回总该开出来了吧？
t_en: This has to be the one, right?

t_ch: 我这就看看…啊，这是！！！
t_en: Let me check... Ah, this is—!!!

t_ch: 这是天父的赎罪膏油…只要为泰坦断崖的篝火添加膏油，天父就会原谅一切罪过，在末日中准许你前往下一个黄金世。
t_en: This is the Atoning Balm of the sky father... We claim that just a single drop of this into the bonfire in Titan Cliff will atone for all your sins, and the sky father will forgive you and grant you passage to the next Era Chrysea in the apocalypse.

t_ch: 虽然惭愧，但这确实是我们重要的收入来源。
t_en: Embarrassing as it is, this is one of our main sources of income.

t_ch: 这东西就别放在火种匣里了！
t_en: Why even bother keeping this in the Coreflame Casket!

t_ch: 还愣着干什么，赶紧点上啊。
t_en: What are you waiting for? Next!

t_ch: 确实… 每分每秒，圣城里都有人死去。
t_en: Yeah... Every second, people in the holy city are dying.

t_ch: 时间不多了——{NICKNAME}阁下，拜托您打开下一个火种匣吧！
t_en: There's no time — {NICKNAME}, please, open the next Coreflame Casket!

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 啊，这是！！！
t_en: Ah... This is—!!!

t_ch: 找到了不得了的东西啊。唉，想当初，我也差点成了他们中的一员……
t_en: Now this is something big. Heh... Y'know, I almost ended up like them once...

t_ch: 你也是清洗者？
t_en: Wait, are you a Cleaner too?

t_ch: 这难道是个圈套…
t_en: Could this be... a trap?

t_ch: 不必紧张。我受大司铎委派在此管理火种匣，多少知晓了一些秘辛，凯妮斯女士也曾因此向我抛出橄榄枝——说实话，元老院的一席之地，的确十分诱人。
t_en: No need to be on edge. The Chaplain assigned me to oversee these Coreflame Caskets, so I know a few secrets. Even Lady Caenis extended me an invitation — honestly, a seat in the Council of Elders is indeed a tempting offer.

t_ch: 可…成为「清洗者」虽然能够继承大量知识和记忆，却也意味着自己独有的记忆将被淡化、抹去。
t_en: But... becoming a Cleaner means inheriting vast knowledge and memories — at the cost of losing your own.

t_ch: 我就是为了不上战场才来当祭司的，这些事情…对我来说果然还是太勉强了。
t_en: I became a priest so I wouldn't have to fight on the battlefield. This... This is just too much for me.

t_ch: 我又筛选出一批火种匣，还剩下七十二个需要确认。该死，这得开到什么时候？可是我…嘶……
t_en: I've sorted through another batch of Coreflame Caskets. Still <unbreak>72</unbreak> more to go. Darn it, how long is this gonna take? But I... ngh...

t_ch: 你不舒服吗？
t_en: Hey, you okay?

t_ch: 啊，不…没关系。不打紧。请您继续解开下一个火种匣吧！
t_en: Ah, no, no, it's fine. I'm fine. Please, let's keep going. Open the next Casket.

t_ch: 啊…你…你是……？
t_en: Ah... you... you're...?

t_ch: 您是…{NICKNAME}阁下？对了，火种匣，要继续打开火种匣。
t_en: You're... {NICKNAME}? Right... the Caskets. I need to keep opening them.

t_ch: 这个…是考卷？不…经卷…不对……
t_en: Wait, this is... an exam paper? No... a scripture? No, that can't be right...

t_ch: 你真没事？感觉不大对劲…
t_en: You sure you're okay? You don't seem like yourself...

t_ch: 没有一惊一乍，好不习惯。
t_en: Wow, no sudden outbursts? Feels kinda weird.

t_ch: 不必担心，{NICKNAME}阁下…我其实感觉好多了。
t_en: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}... I actually feel much better now.

t_ch: 想起来了，这是刻法勒的谕示集，每个侍奉天父的祭司，都要在受洗礼前对它宣誓虔诚。
t_en: I remember now. This is the oracles of Kephale. Every priest serving the sky father must swear their devotion to them before baptism.

t_ch: 从树庭「绳结学派」结业时，大家都以为我会成为一位工程兵…但在本该去应征的那天，我却选择对它宣誓，成为了一名祭司。
t_en: When I graduated from Nodism in the Grove, everyone assumed I'd become an engineer. But on the day I was supposed to enlist... I swore my oath instead. I became a priest.

t_ch: 对不起，阿普列尤斯老师…我太害怕了。害怕面对黑潮，害怕直面死亡…可现在，就像你们一样，这一天还是来到了我的头上。
t_en: I'm sorry, Mr. Apuleius... I was scared. Scared of the black tide. Scared of death. But now, just like you... my time has come.

t_ch: 我想至少今天，至少这次…呃啊…可档案里的线索都用尽了，我还是想不起来…找不出那个火种匣。时间不多了…果然，我还是和以前一样没用……
t_en: At least for today, at least this time — ugh... I've gone through all the records, but I still can't remember... I still can't find the right Coreflame Casket. We're running out of time... I really am useless, just like before...

t_ch: 再试试，总能找到的。
t_en: Try again. We'll find it.

t_ch: 这又不是你的错……
t_en: This isn't your fault...

t_ch: 时间宝贵，别自怨自艾了。
t_en: We don't have time for this. Focus.

t_ch: 谢谢…您说的是。我确实还不愿放弃…您愿意再尝试的话，我会再唤取一个火种匣，拜托您了！
t_en: Thank you... You're right. I don't want to give up yet. If you're willing to keep going, I'll summon another Coreflame Casket — please, I'm counting on you!

t_ch: 我？我这是在…我是……
t_en: I... what am I...? I am...?

t_ch: 祭司难以置信地抚摸着自己的脸颊，随后突然镇静下来，好像接受了某种现实。
t_en: The priest touches his face in disbelief. Then, suddenly, he calms, as if accepting some unknown reality.

t_ch: 我是…伊来内。
t_en: I am... Alain.

t_ch: 这次匣子里面是余火吗？
t_en: Is this one holding the ember?

t_ch: 不必看了…这不是装余火的匣子。我已经想起余火在哪里了。
t_en: No need to check... This isn't the right Casket. I remember where the ember is now.

t_ch: 封存余火的火种匣由三层秘术锁保护，{NICKNAME}阁下，只差最后一步…相信您一定能把它打开。
t_en: The Coreflame Casket holding the ember is sealed behind three layers of arcane seals. {NICKNAME}, this is the final step... I know you can do it.

t_ch: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
t_en: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

t_ch: 一枚余火缓缓下落，降在伊来内的掌心。
t_en: A single ember drifts downward, landing gently in Alain's palm.

t_ch: 没想到有一天，我也能触碰到天父的火种。
t_en: Never thought I'd live to touch the sky father's Coreflame...

t_ch: 这次也没有大呼小叫。
t_en: Huh. No dramatic reactions this time.

t_ch: 好欣慰，你成长了。
t_en: Glad to see you've grown.

t_ch: 呵呵…原来我是那样一个人吗？
t_en: Heh... So that's the kind of person I was, huh?

t_ch: 不重要了…请您将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
t_en: It doesn't matter anymore... Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

t_ch: 是撤退的时候了。
t_en: It's time to go.

t_ch: 我吗？…不必了。
t_en: Me? No, I'll stay...

t_ch: 为什么不一起去？
t_en: Why aren't you coming with us?

t_ch: 时间已经不多了…属于我的时间。
t_en: Because... my time is almost up.

t_ch: 只有凯妮斯女士和「清洗者」知晓余火所在的火种匣。所以在您来之前，我利用被封存的一份遗物，独自完成了成为「清洗者」的仪式。
t_en: Only Lady Caenis and the Cleaner knew which Casket held the ember. So before you arrived, I used a sealed relic to perform the Cleaner's ritual on myself.

t_ch: 时间紧迫，仪式并不完全，破碎的记忆像潮汐，要把沙滩上的一切抹去…好在最后，它也将那个答案送到了我的面前。
t_en: The ritual was rushed, incomplete. My memories are breaking apart, like waves washing over the shore, erasing everything in their path... But in the end, at least it gave me the answer.

t_ch: 「再创世」就要完成了…
t_en: The Era Nova is almost complete...

t_ch: 为什么要做到这个地步？
t_en: Why go this far?

t_ch: 我还能开更多火种匣！
t_en: I can open more Coreflame Caskets!

t_ch: 您已经为我们做得太多，{NICKNAME}阁下…而且，时间的确也不容许我们打开它们。
t_en: You've already done so much for us, {NICKNAME}... Besides, we don't have time to open them all.

t_ch: 「再创世」——我也曾抱着这样的期盼活着。但当黑潮真的来临，看着黑潮吞没同伴，听到他们的惨叫…我承认，我还是…怕死。
t_en: "Era Nova" — I once lived with that hope, too. But when the black tide came, when I watched it consume my friends and heard their screams... I won't lie. I was still afraid.

t_ch: 怕死亡那一瞬间的痛苦，也怕死后漫长黑暗中的了无知觉。尽管也有人许诺了彼岸……
t_en: Afraid of the pain in that final moment, afraid of the endless dark that follows. Even if some promised salvation beyond...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您原谅，这可能只是一个胆小鬼将死前的胡话——
t_en: {NICKNAME}, forgive me. These are just the ramblings of a coward at death's door—

t_ch: 假使世界会在英雄的眼中重塑，那从未在他们眼中出现过的我们，是否也能得到来世的接引？
t_en: If the world is reshaped through a hero's eyes... then what about those of us who were never seen? Will we have a place in the next life?

t_ch: 那刻夏证明过。我相信他。
t_en: Anaxa proved it's possible. I believe in him.

t_ch: 哈哈。那就…借您吉言。
t_en: Haha... Well then, I'll take your word for it.

t_ch: 希望…我们能在西风的尽头…在那个阳光明媚、没有伤痛的世界重新相识。
t_en: Maybe... we'll meet again, beyond the western winds... in a world of light, free from pain.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你…帮助我做了件能让自己感到佩服的事。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... Thank you. You helped me do something I can be proud of.

t_ch: …我无法保证。
t_en: ...I can't make that promise.

t_ch: 感谢您坦诚相待。因此，即便只有一线生机，我也希望能尽力抓住。
t_en: I appreciate your honesty. That's why even if there's only the slimmest chance... I want to hold onto it.

t_ch: 一生着实过于仓促…{NICKNAME}阁下，谢谢你，帮助我做了一件能让自己感到佩服的事情。
t_en: Life is far too short... {NICKNAME}, thank you for helping me do something I can be proud of.

t_ch: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
t_en: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

t_ch: 时间不多了，请您尽快将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
t_en: There's no time. Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

t_ch: 即便这就是旅途的终点，我也再无遗憾了。
t_en: Even if this is the end of my journey, I have no regrets.

t_ch: 这团由伊来内的生命换来的「余火」，就这样悄无声息地融入光芒，转瞬间消失不见。不知是否是错觉…一股暖流拂过你的面庞。
t_en: The ember, paid for with Alain's life, melts soundlessly into the light, vanishing in an instant. And yet... was it just imagination, or did a warm breeze brush against your cheek?

t_ch: …「愚不可及」。
t_en: ...Unsurpassed idiocy.

t_ch: 但愿一切都是值得的。
t_en: Let's hope it was worth it.

t_ch: 好了，去帮助下一个人吧。
t_en: Alright. Let's find the next person who needs help.

t_ch: 遗体尚有余温，身上可见与黑潮怪物搏斗留下的伤痕。
t_en: The body is still warm, bearing the scars of battle against the creatures of the black tide.

t_ch: 他以这种方式为自己写下了最后的结局。
t_en: This is how he chose to write his final chapter.

t_ch: 打开第一层了。接下来的秘术锁可能会越来越复杂，请小心应对。
t_en: The first layer's down. The next ones will only get more complex — stay sharp.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您用欧洛尼斯的力量，打开最后一重秘术锁吧！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, use Oronyx's power to break the final arcane seal!

t_ch: 你三下五除二揍趴了黑潮造物。
t_en: You knock out the Black Tide Creature in no time.

t_ch: 你们还好吗？
t_en: Are you guys alright?

t_ch: 不，不要紧。谢谢你，英雄大人！只是……
t_en: Yeah, we're fine. Thanks for the rescue, hero! It's just...

t_ch: 我绝对没看错！帮了我们的肯定是个幽…幽灵！
t_en: I swear I'm not seeing things! The one who helped us has to be a... a ghost!

t_ch: 什么情况？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: 在这道屏障罩住我们之前，就有怪物盯上我们了，多亏一位女士将它引开，我们才没有遭遇危险。
t_en: Before this barrier trapped us, a monster was closing in. Thankfully, a woman led it away, keeping us safe.

t_ch: 但那位女士有些面生，而且一转眼就不见了，搞得我们有些慌张……
t_en: But the woman was a stranger, and she disappeared in the blink of an eye. We got a little freaked out...

t_ch: 啊，就是她！
t_en: Ah, that's her!

t_ch: 等一下！
t_en: Wait!

t_ch: 做好事要留名啊！
t_en: Good deeds deserve a name!

t_ch: 我们这就撤去安全地带，英雄大人，如果您再遇到她，还请替我们向她道谢。
t_en: We're heading out to the safe zone now, hero. If you run into her again, please thank her for us.

t_ch: 刻法勒在上，哪位英雄能来救一下啊！
t_en: For Kephale's sake, could some hero please come to the rescue!

t_ch: 我这就来！
t_en: On my way!

t_ch: 眼前的这一位…存在？她一言不发，但你却能理解，她没有敌意。
t_en: This person in front of me... Is she real? She's silent, but somehow you can tell she means no harm.

t_ch: 你好，女士。
t_en: Hello, miss.

t_ch: 有脚，是真人没错。
t_en: She's got feet. No doubt she's a real person.

t_ch: 幽灵一般上镜吗？
t_en: Can ghosts even be seen on camera?

t_ch: …向你问候。
t_en: ...Greetings.

t_ch: …云朵的芳香。你是否…曾到过我的故乡？
t_en: ...The scent of clouds. Have you... been to my homeland?

t_ch: 云朵？莫非……
t_en: Clouds? Could it be...

t_ch: 你是风堇的老乡？
t_en: Are you from the same place as Hyacine?

t_ch: 陌生的词语…但，像是一位天空之子的姓名。或许……
t_en: An unfamiliar term... but it sounds like the name of a Skyfolk. Maybe...

t_ch: 你是说晨昏之眼？
t_en: Are you talking about the Eye of Twilight?

t_ch: 啊啊，艾…格勒。怀念的发音。是的，是的…
t_en: Ah, Aqui.. Aquila. What a nostalgic sound. Yes, yes...

t_ch: 昏光…庭院…那片湛蓝色的风鸣……
t_en: Twilight... Courtyard... the sound of wind in the deep blue sky...

t_ch: 请帮我…找到回去的路。我想要回到那片天空。
t_en: Please help me... find the way home. I want to return to that sky.

t_ch: 语毕，身影在刹那间消散，仿佛从未存在过一般。而你的手中，却在不知不觉间握住了一串吊坠。
t_en: With those words, the figure vanishes in an instant, as if it never existed. But in your hand, you find a pendant you didn't even notice you were holding.

t_ch: 真是幽灵？！
t_en: Was that really a ghost!?

t_ch: 办完任务我找谁交啊？
t_en: Who do I report this to when I'm done with the mission?

t_ch: 没有人回应你。她貌似和昏光庭院有些联系，但好像又不认识风堇，况且「回到天空」是指……
t_en: No one responds. She seems to be connected to the Twilight Courtyard, but doesn't seem to know Hyacine. Also, when she said return to the sky, what did she mean...?

t_ch: 总之，把能做的事做了吧。
t_en: Anyway, I should finish what can be done.

t_ch: 母亲，您曾说…冬、雨、晖，彼此间别无二致。
t_en: Mother, you once said... winter, rain, and sunlight, they are all the same.

t_ch: 唯有彼此齐聚，才是无瑕斑斓的天空。
t_en: Only when they come together, does the sky become flawless and radiant.

t_ch: 吊坠微颤，将你引向更下方。
t_en: The pendant quivers slightly, leading you further down.

t_ch: 父亲，您曾说…微光象征着弥合与疗愈。
t_en: Father, you once said... the faint light symbolizes healing and reconciliation.

t_ch: 但若是医者难以自医，又能去往何处寻？
t_en: But if a healer can't heal themselves, where else can they turn?

t_ch: 吊坠微颤，将你引向更下方。
t_en: The pendant quivers slightly, leading you further down.

t_ch: 晨昏的分界已淡，这份誓言，会随着「昏光庭院」之名传承下去。
t_en: The boundary between dawn and dusk fades, and this vow will live on with the name "Twilight Courtyard."

t_ch: 所以，已经够了…对吧？我真的…好想…再见到你们……
t_en: So, it's enough... right? I really... just want to see you both again...

t_ch: 人影不再言语，你手中的吊坠向往着沉眠，将你引向了天空之底。
t_en: The figure falls silent, and the pendant in your hand sinks into slumber, leading you toward the bottom of the sky.

t_ch: 就是这里…接下来，只要把吊坠放入池中就好。
t_en: This is it... now, just place the pendant into the pool.

t_ch: 将吊坠放下。
t_en: Place the pendant down.

t_ch: 欢迎回家，墨莉亚。
t_en: Welcome home, Moria.

t_ch: 这一次，我们不会再分开了。
t_en: This time, we won't be separated again.

t_ch: 你从疑惑中回神，虹彩色的屏障逐渐在空中溶解——不知何时，风堇用她的权能罩住了你。
t_en: You snap out of your confusion, and the prismatic barrier slowly melts away — somehow, Hyacine has cloaked you with her power.

t_ch: 发动欧洛尼斯祷言时的荡漾感还残留在你的身上，刚刚那段经历，或许…只是一缕追忆。
t_en: The lingering sensation of Oronyx's Prayer still clings to you. That recent experience, perhaps... was just a fleeting memory.

t_ch: 这样就够了吗？
t_en: Is this enough?

t_ch: 愿她了却遗憾。
t_en: May she find peace with her regrets.
...Yeah.

t_ch: …即使羽翼尽散，大地生灵的笑靥使人驻足——天空子民的归宿，却仍是那片湛蓝。
t_en: ...Even with wings scattered, the smiles of the earth's creatures make you stop and look. And the place where Sky denizens belong remains that same blue expanse.

t_ch: 谢谢你们。
t_en: Thank you, everyone.

t_ch: 声音逐渐远去，留下些许祥和。
t_en: The voice fades away, leaving a sense of calm.

t_ch: 空气似乎突然炎热起来，一股粘腻的风缠住你的脚腕，令你本能地觉得不适：「均衡…」一个低沉的，毫无感情的声音低语，「宇宙应当…均衡……」一个又一个回音加入低语，宛如交响。
t_en: The air seems to heat up suddenly, and a sticky wind grips onto your ankles, leaving you feeling intuitively uncomfortable. "Equilibrium..." Mutters a low, emotionless voice. Another whisper echoed, as if in symphony: "The universe should be... in equilibrium..."

t_ch: 谁在说话？
t_en: Who's talking?

t_ch: 我又做梦了？
t_en: Am I dreaming again?

t_ch: 宇宙应当…均衡…
t_en: The universe should be... in equilibrium...

t_ch: 「是的…」那声音说，「均衡……」
t_en: "Yes..." Said the voice, "Equilibrium..."

t_ch: 「『均衡』的『仲裁官』要交给你一项试炼…」许多回音续道，「为了诸界的平衡…展示你的力量，而我们仲裁；强大之人将获得机遇，弱小者亦有喘息之机。」
t_en: "The Arbitrators of the Equilibrium are giving you a trial." And the echoes continued, "For the equilibrium of all worlds, you must demonstrate your strength. The strong will be given greater opportunities, the weak a chance to breathe."

t_ch: 「通过试炼，则证明你的力量已动摇了天秤。」声音说，「诸界因此改变，从而…均衡；你将面对更强的敌手，更难的谜题，以及…更丰厚的报偿。」
t_en: "Passing the trial will prove that your strength has shaken the scales of power." The voice said, "Worlds will change, and thus... equilibrium. You will encounter stronger enemies, harder puzzles, and... greater rewards."

t_ch: 「均衡…」回音不断重复，「你仍会遭遇试炼…」
t_en: "After equilibrium..." The voice keeps repeating, "You will go on to face yet more trials..."

t_ch: 能不能用人话解释下。
t_en: Please explain in the human language.

t_ch: 声音没有回答。
t_en: The voice does not answer.

t_ch: 这是所谓的「动态难度」吗？
t_en: Is this the so-called "Dynamic Difficulty"?

t_ch: 声音没有回答。
t_en: The voice does not answer.

t_ch: 我能拒绝这什么「试炼」吗？
t_en: Can I refuse this "trial"?

t_ch: 声音没有回答，半晌：「这是你的选择…」它低声说，「但均衡必将得到维系……」
t_en: The voice does not answer, then after a while: "It is your choice to make..." And it continued, "But in the end, equilibrium will be upheld..."
